Table	Create Table
analytics_events	CREATE TABLE `analytics_events` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `eventType` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `eventData` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `path` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sessionId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `userId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
